title: Melanoid Axolotls
description: Replaces the rare blue axolotl with melanoid ones (because blue ones don't exist IRL unless they're cruelly dyed!)
body:
Replaces the fictional rare blue axolotl with the real life melanistic coloration!

## Why?
- I have owned two melanoid axolotls and I want to represent them in the game :3
- The existence of the blue axolotl in Minecraft has unfortunately lead to an increase of dyed blue axolotls in the real life pet trade, the act of which is a harmful to these axolotls. I know Mojang likely didn't intend this and just wanted a fun easter egg, but it's a side effect that disheartens me.
